info.title: Related Notes
info.description: Notes API allows you to manage additional information attached to CRM records. Notes provide context and details about contacts, accounts, deals, tasks, and other modules. Use this API to create, retrieve, update, or delete notes associated with parent records. Supports both single and bulk operations for efficient note management across your CRM data.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of notes associated with a specific parent record in a CRM module.

schema.description: Response containing note data and pagination information

items.description: A note record with static fields and dynamic additional properties

id.description: Unique identifier of the note

items.description: Attachment file details

$file_id.description: Unique file identifier for the attachment

id.description: Unique identifier of the attachment record

module.description: Module information of the parent record

api_name.description: API name of the parent module

id.description: Module ID
Unique identifier of the parent record

count.description: Number of records in current page

more_records.description: Indicates if more records are available

next_page_token.description: Token for fetching the next page

previous_page_token.description: Token for fetching the previous page

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or malformed request

schema.description: Error response for note retrieval failures

post.description: Creates one or more notes associated with a specific parent record. Either note content or note title must be provided (at least one is mandatory).

requestBody.description: Request body containing note data to create

schema.description: Request payload for creating notes

data.description: Array of note objects to create

items.description: Note object with title, content, and parent information

module.description: Module information of the parent record

api_name.description: API name of the parent module

id.description: Module ID

id.description: Unique identifier of the user

id.description: Unique identifier of the user

put.summary: Update Multiple Notes for a Record
put.description: Updates one or more notes associated with a specific parent record. Either note content or note title must be provided (at least one is mandatory) for each note.

requestBody.description: Request body containing note data to update

schema.description: Request payload for updating notes

data.description: Array of note objects to update

Created_Time.description: Timestamp when the note was created

id.description: Unique identifier of the user

Modified_By.description: User who last modified the note

id.description: Unique identifier of the user

207.description: Multi-Status - Partial success with some records updated and some failed

data.description: Array of update results with mixed success and error statuses

code.description: Result code

Modified_By.description: User who last modified the note

id.description: Unique identifier of the user

code.description: Error code

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or malformed request

schema.description: Error response for note update failures

delete.description: Deletes one or more notes associated with a specific parent record using comma-separated note IDs in the query parameter.

schema.description: Success response for note deletion

code.description: Result code

code.description: Result code

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted note

code.description: Error code

id.description: Unique identifier of the note that failed to delete

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or missing required parameter

schema.description: Error response for note deletion failures

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific note record associated with a parent record in a CRM module.

Unique identifier of the parent record

NoContent.description: No content - The request was successful but there are no records to return

schema.description: Error response for authentication failures

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

NotFound.description: Not Found - The requested resource does not exist

schema.description: Error response for not found requests

ParentRecordModule.name: parentRecordModule
ParentRecordModule.description: The module API name of the parent record (e.g., Contacts, Leads, Deals, Accounts)

ParentRecordId.name: parentRecordId
ParentRecordId.description: The unique identifier of the parent record. Must be a valid numeric record ID.

NoteId.name: noteId
NoteId.description: The unique identifier of the specific note record. Must be a valid numeric record ID.

Fields.name: fields
Fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to include in the response. Field names must follow API naming conventions.

Ids.name: ids
Ids.description: Comma-separated list of note record IDs to delete. Required for bulk deletion operations.

PerPage.name: perPage
PerPage.description: Number of records to return per page

SortBy.name: sort_by
SortBy.description: Field name to sort the notes by
